cap Console { fn log(msg: String): produce Unit }
fn f() := perform Console.log("hi")
---
Cap(name="Console", ops=["log"])
Fn(name="f", body=Call(callee=Member(object=Perform(cap="Console"), member="log"), args=[String("hi")]))
==========
fn f() := handle E with h in produce x
---
Fn(name="f", body=Handle(cap="E", handler=Variable("h"), body=Produce(Variable("x"))))
